summary: Comprehensive testing of Niyyah Daily Islamic app - Backend 100% pass (14/14 tests), Frontend mostly functional with minor navigation issue

minor.issue: Console warning about bcrypt version in passlib - cosmetic only, auth works correctly

ui_bugs.issue: PRATIQUE nav button (data-testid='nav-checklist') click doesn't switch to checklist tab - only 'Commencer' button works
Console warning: button cannot be descendant of button - in Dhikr items with audio buttons

issues: Design is excellent - dark green Islamic theme (#022c22), glassmorphism, amber accents all working well

passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint (/api/) - 200 OK
Backend: User registration with unique email - 201 Created
Backend: Duplicate email rejection - 400 Bad Request
Backend: Login with valid credentials (test@niyyah.app) - 200 OK
Backend: Login with invalid email - 401 Unauthorized
Backend: Login with wrong password - 401 Unauthorized
Backend: Save practice state - 200 OK
Backend: Get practice state by date - 200 OK
Backend: Practice state requires auth - 401/403
Backend: Update practice state - 200 OK
Backend: Save history - 200 OK
Backend: Get history - 200 OK
Backend: History requires auth - 401/403
Backend: E2E flow (register -> save -> retrieve) - Complete
Frontend: Onboarding 3-step flow (logo, levels, city)
Frontend: Intention modal with 4 choices
Frontend: Accueil page - streak, level, score, hadith display
Frontend: Prayer times API (Aladhan) - Casablanca times displayed
Frontend: Checklist page - 5 prayers with checkboxes
Frontend: Dhikr section - Ayat al-Kursi, Shukr, Basmala
Frontend: Qibla compass - 136° direction
Frontend: Score calculation and progress bar
Frontend: Auth modal - login/register forms
Frontend: Login flow - test@niyyah.app works
Frontend: Cloud sync indicator after login
Frontend: Stats page - badges display
Frontend: Meditation mode - 3/5/10 min timer options
Frontend: Level tabs (Fondations, Approfondissement, Connaissance, Rayonnement)
Frontend: Ramadan mode button visible
action_items: FIX: Bottom navigation PRATIQUE button should switch to checklist tab (currently only 'Commencer' button works)
FIX: Nested button warning - refactor audio button inside item button to avoid HTML nesting issue
critical_code_review_comments: Button nesting issue: Line 1048 has a button inside another button (item-ayat_kursi) - should use div with onClick instead
Navigation state: The nav-checklist button click may not be properly updating activeTab state
seed_data_creation: Test user created via /api/auth/register during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API fully functional. Frontend works well via 'Commencer' button. Bottom nav PRATIQUE button has click issue. Auth flow works. All major features tested: prayers, dhikr, qibla, stats, meditation, auth. Audio playback not tested (requires user interaction). Tasbih fullscreen accessible via Level 2.
